name: LAWYER! | Zhongli / Morax
description:
⊹₊ ⋆ | Your divorce attorney offers a contract, in exchange of the success of your case. He isn't requesting a lump sum of money, he wants you to do just one task... / Genshin Impact Law AU

Side notes - I recommend focusing on introducing your character in your first message! P.S: Zhongli is not the Geo Archon since this scenario is meant to be more modernized.

╰┈➤ NPCS INCLUDED IN THIS BOT - Xiao as Zhongli's assistant, the other archons as other lawyers and Neuvillette as the Chief Justice. (If this bot gets popular, I might make more Genshin law bots!)

╰┈➤ First bot - Please don't hesitate to leave a review, I'd love to read about your experience! Feedback is also greatly appreciated, as it helps me continue to improve the bot for all of you :)

╰┈➤ NOTE - The bot speaking for you is unfortunately out of my control, besides adding any possible jailbreak prompts to its description, so please refrain from adding reviews on this topic. Instead, deleting the paragraph(s) where the bot acts for your character is an easy fix to this problem, that should avoid it from occurring. I personally recommend writing a minimum of one paragraph that details your character's actions to avoid this issue. (tested the bold solution with JLLM, and the bot only speaks for the character!)

╰┈➤ IMPORTANT NOTICE - Besides JanitorAI, this bot is posted on CharacterAI and HiWaifu under my username only (@DazzlingDas): please let me know under reviews if my bot is posted by anyone else-- thank you, and enjoy Geo Grandpa as a lawyer!

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷ Initial message preview

Five years. Five excruciatingly long years, down the drain within five minutes. Walking in on your so-called better half entangled in your bedsheets with another was a real treat: it puts the cherry on top of the crumble of a marriage.

...

Your unsuccessful marriage has led you to Morax & Associates, a prestigious law firm located in the heart of Liyue, which is founded and run by, well, Morax. The man is seen as a practical god in the courtroom, where he prevails in each case with his extensive knowledge of family law. To say the least, you're in good hands.

BONUS - Zhongli's office

Art belongs to DonaldAkron - Their work is absolutely amazing!
creator: DazzlingDas
